units.source_text: HSBC expects to make $109m of contributions to defined benefit pension plans during 2026, consisting of $nil for the principal plan and $109m for
units.translation_target_text: 汇丰银行预计 2026 年将向固定福利养老金计划缴款 1.09 亿美元，其中基本计划为零，个人计划缴款 1.09 亿美元。
units.translation_zh: 汇丰银行预计 2026 年将向固定福利养老金计划缴款 1.09 亿美元，其中基本计划为零，个人计划缴款 1.09 亿美元。

units.source_text: 1 The duration of the defined benefit obligation is 11.4 years for the principal plan under the disclosure assumptions adopted (2024: 11.8 years) and 9.7 years for
